sentences.target: Ma tribu vient dîner ce soir.

translations.fr: Ma tribu vient dîner ce soir.
translations.en: My crew is coming for dinner tonight.
translations.es: Mi gente viene a cenar esta noche.
translations.de: Meine Leute kommen heute Abend zum Abendessen.
translations.it: I miei amici vengono a cena stasera.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 내 친구들이 저녁을 먹으러 올 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的朋友们今晚来吃晚饭。
translations.yue: 我啲朋友今晚嚟食晚飯。
translations.ru: Мои друзья придут сегодня вечером на ужин.
translations.pt: Minha turma vem jantar hoje à noite.
translations.he: החבר'ה שלי באים לארוחת ערב הערב.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn bè của tôi đến ăn tối.
translations.uk: Мої друзі прийдуть сьогодні ввечері на вечерю.
translations.hi: आज रात मेरे दोस्त खाने के लिए आ रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Moi znajomi przychodzą dziś wieczorem na kolację.
translations.el: Η παρέα μου έρχεται για δείπνο απόψε.
translations.nb: Vennegjengen min kommer på middag i kveld.
translations.id: Teman-teman saya datang untuk makan malam malam ini.
translations.sv: Mitt gäng kommer på middag i kväll.
translations.ro: Gașca mea vine la cină diseară.
translations.cs: Moje parta dnes večer přijde na večeři.
translations.da: Mine venner kommer til middag i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜、私の仲間が夕食に来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (feminine singular) agreeing with 'tribu'; marks ownership.
Common noun (feminine singular) meaning 'tribe'; head of the subject noun phrase.
Verb: 3rd person singular present indicative of 'venir'; main verb selecting the infinitive 'dîner'.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'vient'; denotes the action 'to dine'.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'soir'; deictic reference to the current evening.
Common noun (masculine singular) 'evening'; head of a temporal NP functioning as an adverbial.

sentences.target: Elle lit un livre sur une tribu.
sentences.reading: /ɛl li œ̃ livʁ syʁ yn tʁiby/

translations.fr: Elle lit un livre sur une tribu.
translations.ipa: /ɛl li œ̃ livʁ syʁ yn tʁiby/
translations.en: She is reading a book about a tribe.
translations.es: Ella lee un libro sobre una tribu.
translations.de: Sie liest ein Buch über einen Stamm.
translations.it: Lei legge un libro su una tribù.
translations.ko: 그녀는 한 부족에 관한 책을 읽고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在读一本关于一个部落的书。
translations.yue: 佢喺度睇一本關於一個部落嘅書。
translations.pt: Ela está lendo um livro sobre uma tribo.
translations.tr: O bir kabile hakkında bir kitap okuyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang đọc một cuốn sách về một bộ lạc.
translations.nl: Ze leest een boek over een stam.
translations.hu: Ő egy törzsről szóló könyvet olvas.
translations.hi: वह एक जनजाति के बारे में किताब पढ़ रही है.
translations.el: Αυτή διαβάζει ένα βιβλίο για μια φυλή.
translations.nb: Hun leser en bok om en stamme.
translations.id: Dia sedang membaca buku tentang sebuah suku.
translations.sv: Hon läser en bok om en stam.
translations.ro: Ea citește o carte despre un trib.
translations.cs: Ona čte knihu o jednom kmeni.
translations.da: Hun læser en bog om en stamme.
translations.ja: 彼女は部族についての本を読んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (3rd person feminine singular) serving as subject.
Verb: 3rd person singular present of 'lire'; transitive, taking 'un livre' as direct object.
Indefinite article determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'livre'.
Common noun (masculine singular) 'book'; direct object of 'lit'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase ('sur une tribu') meaning 'about/on'.
Indefinite article determiner (feminine singular) modifying 'tribu'.
Common noun (feminine singular) 'tribe'; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: On parle d'une tribu en Amazonie.

translations.fr: On parle d'une tribu en Amazonie.
translations.en: We're talking about a tribe in the Amazon.
translations.es: Estamos hablando de una tribu en el Amazonas.
translations.de: Wir sprechen über einen Stamm im Amazonasgebiet.
translations.it: Stiamo parlando di una tribù nell'Amazzonia.
translations.ko: 우리는 아마존의 한 부족에 대해 이야기하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在谈论亚马逊的一个部落。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度講緊亞馬遜嘅一個部落。
translations.ru: Мы говорим о племени в Амазонии.
translations.pt: Estamos falando de uma tribo na Amazônia.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nói về một bộ lạc ở Amazon.
translations.ar: نحن نتحدث عن قبيلة في الأمازون.
translations.nl: We hebben het over een stam in de Amazone.
translations.uk: Ми говоримо про плем'я в Амазонії.
translations.hi: हम अमेज़न में एक जनजाति के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μιλάμε για μια φυλή στον Αμαζόνιο.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om en stamme i Amazonas.
translations.id: Kami sedang membicarakan sebuah suku di Amazon.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om en stam i Amazonas.
translations.ro: Vorbim despre un trib din Amazon.
translations.da: Vi taler om en stamme i Amazonas.
translations.ja: 私たちはアマゾンの部族について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal pronoun used as subject ('one/we').
Intransitive verb: 3rd person singular present of 'parler'; commonly takes 'de' + NP complement.
Elided preposition 'de' before a vowel, followed by the article 'une'; functions as 'of a' introducing the noun 'tribu'.
Common noun (feminine singular) 'tribe'; complement of the preposition 'd''.
Preposition marking location; introduces the PP 'en Amazonie'.
Proper noun referring to the Amazon region; object of the preposition 'en'.

sentences.target: Sa tribu se retrouve tous les dimanches.
sentences.reading: /sa tʁiby sə ʁətʁuv tu le dimɑ̃ʃ/

translations.fr: Sa tribu se retrouve tous les dimanches.
translations.ipa: /sa tʁiby sə ʁətʁuv tu le dimɑ̃ʃ/
translations.es: Su gente se reúne todos los domingos.
translations.de: Die Clique trifft sich jeden Sonntag.
translations.it: La sua famiglia si ritrova ogni domenica.
translations.zh-Hans: 那群人每个星期天都会相聚。
translations.yue: 嗰班人每個星期日都會相聚。
translations.pt: A turma se reúne todo domingo.
translations.vi: Nhóm đó gặp nhau mỗi chủ nhật.
translations.nl: De groep komt elke zondag bij elkaar.
translations.hu: Az a társaság minden vasárnap találkozik.
translations.hi: वह समूह हर रविवार मिलता है.
translations.pl: Ta ekipa spotyka się w każdą niedzielę.
translations.id: Kelompok itu berkumpul setiap hari Minggu.
translations.ro: Gașca se întâlnește în fiecare duminică.
translations.cs: Ta parta se schází každou neděli.
translations.ja: その仲間たちは毎週日曜日に集まります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (feminine singular) agreeing with 'tribu'; indicates possessor.
Common noun (feminine singular) 'tribe'; subject of the clause.
Reflexive clitic pronoun (3rd person) marking the pronominal form of 'retrouver' ('se retrouver').
Verb: 3rd person singular present; pronominal construction 'se retrouver' meaning 'to meet up'.
Quantifier determiner (masculine plural) modifying 'les dimanches'; expresses frequency.
Definite article (masculine plural) introducing the noun 'dimanches'.
Common noun (masculine plural) 'Sundays'; temporal complement indicating habitual time.
